headline: VICI Properties (VICI) Valuation Review After Alberta Casino And Hotel Sale Leaseback Transaction
summary: VICI Properties (VICI) has drawn renewed attention to its stock after agreeing to acquire the real estate of Deerfoot Inn & Casino, Great Northern Casino, and two adjacent Alberta hotels in a sale-leaseback transaction with PURE Casino Entertainment. See our latest analysis for VICI Properties. Recent deals around the Alberta casinos and the US$1.5b One Beverly Hills mezzanine loan come as VICI’s 7 day share price return of 3.95% contrasts with a 30 day share price return decline of 6.77%,...

headline: Is VICI Properties (VICI) Offering Value After Mixed Returns And REIT Sector Interest?
summary: If you are wondering whether VICI Properties at around US$27.66 is offering good value today, it helps to step back and look at what the recent returns and fundamentals are really telling you. Over the short term, the stock is up 3.9% over the last 7 days, while it is down 6.8% over 30 days, with returns of 1.3% over 3 years, 25.6% over 5 years, and a 4.0% decline over the last year. Recent headlines around VICI Properties have focused on its position in the real estate investment trust...
